title: Spicy Crunchy Peruvian Jerusalem Artichoke Stir-fry
description: This dish is a spicy and crunchy weeknight option featuring dairy-free-friendly Jerusalem artichokes, which are cooked until crispy for added texture.

ingredients.name: Red bell pepper
ingredients.notes: Remove stems and seeds for less heat

ingredients.name: Spices (optional)
ingredients.notes: Cumin, chili powder, paprika, and black pepper for the spiciness

instructions: Wash and scrub the Jerusalem artichokes well. Slice them into thin rounds and lightly coat with oil.
Place the sliced artichokes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, making sure they are evenly spaced for even cooking. Bake in the oven for 12-15 minutes until crispy.
While the artichokes are baking, slice the red bell pepper into thin strips and green onions into segments. Finely chop the garlic cloves.
In a wok or large skillet over medium heat, add coconut oil or vegetable oil and sauté the garlic until fragrant but not browned.
Add the sliced red bell peppers to the wok/skillet and stir for 2-3 minutes before adding the green onions. Cook for another minute or two.
Once the artichokes are done, remove them from the oven, let them cool slightly, then coarsely chop them.
Combine the chopped artichokes with the sautéed vegetables in the wok/skillet and add your desired spices to taste. Stir well until all ingredients are evenly coated with spices.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
